name: BSA Standard Curve Dilution Series (2 mg/mL Stock)
nameCn: BSA 标准曲线稀释系列（2 mg/mL 母液）

components.name: BSA (bovine serum albumin, fraction V)
components.note: 2 mg/mL stock in ddH₂O or same buffer as samples; aliquot 200 µL at -20°C

notes.en: Prepare in same buffer as samples. BCA: 37°C 30 min, A562. Bradford: RT 5 min, A595. Triplicate.
notes.zh: 用与样品相同的缓冲液配制。BCA：37°C 30 min，A562。Bradford：室温 5 min，A595。三重复。

ref: Smith et al. (1985) Anal Biochem 150:76 / Bradford (1976) Anal Biochem 72:248

usage.en: Diluted BSA standard curve for protein quantification assays (BCA at 37°C A562, Bradford at RT A595).
usage.zh: BSA 标准曲线稀释系列，用于 BCA（A562）和 Bradford（A595）蛋白定量。

prepSteps.step: Prepare 2 mg/mL BSA stock: dissolve in ddH₂O or in the same buffer used for protein samples (important for matrix matching).
prepSteps.note: Aliquot 200 µL per tube; freeze at -20°C. Thaw fresh for each use.

prepSteps.step: Prepare dilution series in sample buffer. Pipette in duplicate or triplicate.
BCA assay: add 200 µL BCA working reagent; 37°C 30 min; read A562. Bradford: add 200 µL Bradford reagent; RT 5 min; read A595.
Fit linear regression (R² > 0.99) to calculate unknown protein concentration.
